rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for interface-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model when writing AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE annex content aligns with AADL component type and implementation scope rules.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the analyzed AADL model.
Validate that all AGREE expressions reference only visible ports, constants, and data types from the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees for ports must be placed in valid component type scopes.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-specific bindings in component type annexes.
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax and annex placement rules
